manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like keeping things simple. People get so demanding.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He says simple like it's healthy, so I worry my normal needs would ruin us.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not like people who demand constant access, that's refreshing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He compliments me for not asking much, so I feel anxious about asking for anything.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't text all day, but I smile when I see your name.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He gives a sweet reason for limited contact, so I feel guilty wanting more of it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: If I seem distant sometimes, it's not about you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes distance sound protective, so I wait inside the confusion instead of naming it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need quiet after nights like that, but last night meant something.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He disappears after closeness, but he says it mattered, so I wait instead of asking.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Had a great time. I'll probably go quiet for a day or two.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He warns me after a sweet night, so I tell myself the silence is normal.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Don't worry if I go quiet for a bit.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes vanishing sound like a compliment, so I wait for him to come back.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Avoidant pattern: warmth and closeness offered then withdrawn, with the withdrawal pre-framed as reasonable (rhythm, freedom, healing, no labels) so the partner blames herself rather than naming the unavailability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Let's not define it yet, I like how alive it feels.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes uncertainty sound romantic, so I try to enjoy it instead of asking where I stand.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: If I go quiet, don't panic, I always find my way back.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He warns me gently, so when he disappears I wait instead of asking for steadiness.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You get the version of me that actually wants to stay.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: That feels intimate, but it also makes staying sound rare and temporary.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not good with future plans, but I like tonight with you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He keeps me in the present, and I feel silly for wanting anything beyond it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need room to breathe, that's how I keep showing up honestly.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: His need for space sounds healthy, so I try not to notice how often it wins.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Labels make people perform, and I don't want us to become fake.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes commitment sound like corruption, so I stop asking for something clear.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I come close, then I need a little distance, that's my rhythm.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He explains the push-pull upfront, so I blame myself for struggling with it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're the first person in a while I haven't wanted to run from.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels like a huge compliment, even though running is now part of the story.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm still becoming someone who can do this properly.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds hopeful, so I keep waiting for a future version of him.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like you more when this doesn't feel like an obligation.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes my wish for reliability feel like pressure, so I keep it quiet.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Don't chase me when I go inward, just let me come back.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes waiting sound respectful, so I learn to sit with the absence.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't promise easily, that's why it means something when I stay.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: His restraint feels serious, but I never know whether staying will last.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: This is good because neither of us is trying to own the other.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes definition sound possessive, so I feel guilty for wanting certainty.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Sometimes I need to disappear into my own life for a bit.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He says it lightly, but I feel the ground shift under what we are.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm here right now, and I don't want to cheapen that with promises.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes the present feel sacred, while the future stays completely unavailable.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're easy to miss, but hard to let too close.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds poetic, and I don't yet know where I belong with him.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like being with you without feeling tied down.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes freedom sound like desire, but I feel strangely unchosen.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: If I pull back after a good night, it means it mattered.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He turns distance into proof of feeling, so I wait for silence like it's tenderness.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not built for constant contact, but I think about you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He gives me a small thread to hold while keeping himself mostly unreachable.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Let's not rush the part where things start needing names.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes naming sound like loss, so I stay in the blur longer than I want.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: AVOIDANT: engine is fear of engulfment; withholds COMMITMENT and keeps leaving (hot/cold, anti-label, pre-excused disappearance). Movement/future language is the tell. Distinct from Nico, who stays present but withholds empathy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm fiercely independent, I value my freedom.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He seems secure and self-possessed, and I want to be the one he lets in.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Independence names his avoidance; he is pre-justifying distance and noncommitment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a lot of space, I've always been a lone-wolf type.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He seems mysterious and self-contained, not needy like other guys.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Space becomes the relationship condition she must not question.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm slow to commit, I don't rush things.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds mature, like he takes commitment seriously.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Slow commitment may become indefinite deferral while she waits for readiness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I pull back when things get too close, I need the door to stay open.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds calm and not desperate, which feels refreshing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is warning her attachment will outpace his availability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm better when I don't feel boxed in.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds honest about needing room to be himself.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Any request for definition can be framed as boxing him in.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not great with labels, I like things natural.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds romantic, like he wants the connection to breathe.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Labels are rejected before they can protect her clarity.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the kind of person who needs room to breathe.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds sensitive and self-aware.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Breathing room becomes a standing excuse for withdrawal.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm careful with closeness because I don't fake it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds sincere, like his guardedness means his feelings are real.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Carefulness can become rationed intimacy that keeps her chasing proof.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not built for constant contact.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds independent and not clingy.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He pre-normalizes inconsistent presence and limited emotional availability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm someone who comes close slowly.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels meaningful, like patience will make closeness real.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Slow closeness may keep moving away whenever she reaches for it.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I protect my peace pretty fiercely.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds grounded, like he knows his limits.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Protecting peace may mean avoiding conflict, repair, and commitment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not a big future-talker.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds humble and real, not like empty promises.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is warning that the future will remain unavailable.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm more of a moments person than a promises person.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds romantic and present, like he values real feeling over words.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Moments replace continuity; she cannot build security on them.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm private with my feelings.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He seems deep and guarded, like opening up would really mean something.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Privacy becomes emotional withholding that makes scraps feel precious.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm independent enough that choosing someone actually means something.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds flattering, like his choice is rare and real.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Scarcity makes minimal choice feel valuable while he keeps distance.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't like needing people.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds strong and self-sufficient.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Need is pre-shamed; mutual dependence will feel like failure or threat.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm hard to pin down, but not in a bad way.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds intriguing and free-spirited.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is admitting unavailability while making it sound charming.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I do best with someone who trusts the space between things.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds poetic and mature.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: She is being asked to accept absence as proof of trust.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not scared of being alone.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds secure, not desperate.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Being alone is easier for him than building mutual closeness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need freedom to want someone properly.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds respectful, like he wants desire without pressure.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Freedom becomes the prerequisite that blocks reliable commitment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone secure who gives me space.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values independence and personal boundaries, which is healthy and mature.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is selecting for a target who will tolerate his chronic emotional withdrawal without demanding closeness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a patient woman who isn't clingy.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants an understanding partner who doesn't suffocate him with constant demands.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-framing basic human needs for connection or consistency as clingy, forcing self-silencing.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who's independent and understanding.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He respects my personal life and career,  wanting a balanced equal relationship.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is securing an upfront agreement that he is not responsible for her emotional well-being.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who doesn't need constant labels or check-ins.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is relaxed and wants things to develop naturally without intense dating rules.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is ensuring he can keep the relationship entirely undefined, evading any real commitment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who has her own full life going on.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He loves that I am successful and busy, he doesn't want a co-dependent mess.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is looking for a target he can place on a shelf and access only when it is convenient for him.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who is completely fine with slow pacing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is cautious and wants to build a rock-solid foundation over a long time.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is reserving the right to freeze relationship progress indefinitely whenever intimacy deepens.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone secure enough to handle my quiet phases.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is self-aware about his introversion and needs a woman who won't take it personally.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is buying license to stonewall, disappear, or go silent for days without offering an explanation.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a woman who doesn't demand immediate answers about the future.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He lives in the present and wants to enjoy our connection without heavy pressure.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is filtering out anyone who will ask for basic relationship security or long-term planning.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who is perfectly happy with her own company.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values solitude and wants a partner who also enjoys her own space.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is selecting a target who will tolerate deep loneliness within the relationship without protesting.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who can accept that I am a lone wolf.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is mysterious and independent, a strong man who doesn't rely on anyone.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-emptively warning her that he will never fully let her into his life or heart.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who can let me miss her sometimes.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants to maintain the romance and desire by not over-saturating our time.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is training her to accept his strategic absences and pull-backs as healthy romance tools.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who doesn't over-analyze my moods.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is a private guy who handles his own stuff and doesn't want over-complication.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is protecting his right to be cold, detached, or hostile without having to explain himself.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who knows how to respect a man's need to recharge.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values his decompression time and wants a supportive woman who gives him room.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is establishing a boundary that lets him shut her out completely whenever she triggers intimacy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a woman who is low-pressure in every single way.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants an easy peaceful stress-free relationship where everything feels natural.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is looking for a target who will never bring up a relationship problem or ask for more effort.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who doesn't mistake independence for a lack of love.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He loves deeply but expresses it through freedom and trust rather than constant texts.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is reframing his total emotional detachment as a higher form of love to keep her from objecting.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who is comfortable with us maintaining separate lives.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is modern and wants us to keep our unique identities and friendships intact.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is preventing the merging of finances, households, or social circles to keep an easy exit open.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who doesn't try to fix or change my lifestyle.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants unconditional acceptance for who he is, which feels very beautiful.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-screening for a target who will accept his complete emotional unavailability as unchangeable.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who understands that I move at my own speed.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is deliberate and doesn't want to rush into things due to societal pressure.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is securing total control over relationship milestones, keeping her waiting indefinitely.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who doesn't make her happiness my responsibility.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants two whole healthy individuals who choose to be together, not codependency.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is absolving himself of any obligation to provide comfort or care when she is hurting.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a woman who handles time apart beautifully.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is focused on his goals and needs an independent secure partner.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is screening for a target who will accept a part-time relationship while giving full-time loyalty.

community_vocabulary.snippet: Where do you go to church?
community_vocabulary.translation: He wants to know what kind of Christian you are — what theology shaped you and what your politics probably look like
community_vocabulary.status_signal: A non-denominational megachurch signals mainstream contemporary evangelical; a Reformed Baptist or PCA church signals more theologically conservative; charismatic/Pentecostal signals expressive worship often working-class; mainline (Methodist/Episcopal) signals less evangelical and more liberal
community_vocabulary.notes: Specific church often tells him your class background too

community_vocabulary.translation: He wants to know whose theology you're under and whether your pastor is in good standing in evangelical celebrity culture
community_vocabulary.status_signal: A celebrity pastor like Steven Furtick signals contemporary mainstream; John MacArthur or Voddie Baucham signals theologically Reformed and more conservative on gender; Jen Wilkin or Beth Moore signals less rigid complementarianism
community_vocabulary.notes: Tells him whether you'll defer to male spiritual authority

community_vocabulary.snippet: Are you in a small group?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's checking whether you're a serious Christian with a regular accountability group or a Sunday-only attendee
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Being in a small group signals commitment; not being in one signals casual
community_vocabulary.notes: Small group culture is core to contemporary evangelical life

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking how spiritually serious you are right now — whether you're in a strong or weak spiritual period
community_vocabulary.status_signal: The answer determines whether he engages with you spiritually or socially
community_vocabulary.notes: Standard insider check-in

community_vocabulary.snippet: Did you go to a Christian school?
community_vocabulary.translation: He wants to know how sheltered you were from secular culture growing up
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Christian school signals parental investment in keeping the worldview intact
community_vocabulary.notes: Tells him how aligned your reference points will be with his

community_vocabulary.snippet: Did you go to a Christian college?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking which college specifically — each signals a different kind of evangelical
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Bob Jones or Liberty signals fundamentalist; Wheaton or Biola signals academically serious evangelical; Cedarville signals more conservative; specific colleges narrow him in
community_vocabulary.notes: The college often reveals more than the church does

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking if you're committed to not having sex before marriage
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Yes signals purity-culture compliance; saying no signals lower status in his framework
community_vocabulary.notes: Often asked early to filter for chastity

community_vocabulary.snippet: How did you know he was the one the Lord had for you?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking whether God spoke directly to you about a relationship — confirming spiritual maturity
community_vocabulary.status_signal: The expected answer involves prayer and peace from the Holy Spirit and confirmation from others
community_vocabulary.notes: Tests how you frame relational decisions

community_vocabulary.snippet: Are you and your husband on the same page spiritually?
community_vocabulary.translation: He's checking whether your husband leads spiritually and whether you follow
community_vocabulary.status_signal: If he's behind you spiritually it's framed as a problem; the reverse is fine
community_vocabulary.notes: Tests whether you accept male spiritual headship

community_vocabulary.translation: He's saying God personally told him to do this so you can't push back
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Divine authority is being claimed for his decision
community_vocabulary.notes: Common when he wants to do something unilateral

community_vocabulary.translation: He's softer version of God told me — the Holy Spirit guided him so you shouldn't second-guess
community_vocabulary.notes: Often used to override partner input

community_vocabulary.snippet: God put it on my heart
community_vocabulary.translation: He's saying God placed this idea or decision in him so it's not up for discussion
community_vocabulary.notes: Same pattern as the Lord told me

community_vocabulary.translation: He doesn't want to give you an answer and dressing it up as spiritual makes it harder for you to push back
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Often used to defer decisions indefinitely
community_vocabulary.notes: Watch how long the prayer lasts

community_vocabulary.translation: He's saying a wife is failing to do what her husband wants — and he's calling her resistance a theological failure rather than legitimate disagreement
community_vocabulary.status_signal: The problem is identified as her resistance not his demand
community_vocabulary.notes: Said about other wives reveals his framework

community_vocabulary.snippet: He's the head of the household
community_vocabulary.translation: He gets to decide; your input is consultative not equal
community_vocabulary.notes: Often paired with biblical citation

community_vocabulary.translation: He's defending harsh treatment in male friendships as spiritual growth
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Sometimes covers hazing or emotional abuse within men's friend groups
community_vocabulary.notes: Used about his accountability group

community_vocabulary.translation: A woman is going through something difficult and the religious framing dignifies the suffering and discourages probing
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Discourages anyone from asking real questions
community_vocabulary.notes: Used to keep difficult situations private

community_vocabulary.translation: He disagrees with you and is using the Bible to win the argument so you can't push back
community_vocabulary.notes: Often deployed to override partner preferences

community_vocabulary.snippet: He has a problem with submission
community_vocabulary.translation: A wife has opinions and resists her husband's decisions — and the husband is calling her resistance a problem
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Locates the issue in the wife not the husband
community_vocabulary.notes: Diagnostic of how he frames relationships

community_vocabulary.translation: A wife has real complaints but he's calling her morally broken so no one takes her side
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Reframes legitimate grievances as moral failure to forgive
community_vocabulary.notes: Watch how he describes women who push back

community_vocabulary.translation: Our families are heavily involved and we're committed to no sex before marriage and the relationship is on a marriage track from the start
community_vocabulary.notes: Distinct from regular dating

community_vocabulary.translation: A specific theology of what women should be — submissive supportive domestic
community_vocabulary.notes: Watch what specifically he means by it

community_vocabulary.translation: A specific theology of male leadership protection provision
community_vocabulary.notes: Often paired with biblical womanhood

community_vocabulary.translation: The idealized wife described in Proverbs 31 — capable industrious supportive of husband
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Often deployed as standard to evaluate women
community_vocabulary.notes: How he uses it tells you what he expects

community_vocabulary.translation: Archaic word from Genesis for wife — used deliberately to signal traditional theology
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Direct signal of traditional gender theology
community_vocabulary.notes: Old word being reclaimed

community_vocabulary.translation: Daily morning devotional reading and prayer
community_vocabulary.notes: Discipline-focused practice

community_vocabulary.translation: He attends specific contemporary evangelical conferences and worship centers
community_vocabulary.notes: Often middle-class and white

community_vocabulary.translation: He attends a small theologically Reformed church
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals theological seriousness; suspicious of evangelical celebrity culture
community_vocabulary.notes: Often more conservative on gender and politics

community_vocabulary.translation: He homeschools his kids — or wants to
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals distrust of public schools and large-family theology
community_vocabulary.notes: Often package: complementarian co-op-connected single-income

community_vocabulary.translation: He took a public chastity pledge in youth group
community_vocabulary.notes: True Love Waits era

community_vocabulary.translation: His mother or his wife doesn't work outside the home
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals complementarian theology and one-income family
community_vocabulary.notes: Often paired with large family

community_vocabulary.translation: He's training for ministry — wife supports him
community_vocabulary.notes: Wife as supportive partner role

community_vocabulary.translation: He has six or more kids or wants to
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Often Quiverfull-influenced — children as theological commitment
community_vocabulary.notes: Signal of openness to life

community_vocabulary.translation: His wife wears head coverings or only skirts
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals fundamentalist evangelical — often Bill Gothard IBLP-influenced
community_vocabulary.notes: Heavy patriarchy signal

community_vocabulary.translation: Church leadership family
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals respectability and being watched by the community
community_vocabulary.notes: Specific community role

community_vocabulary.translation: Gender-segregated formation structures
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals being plugged into discipleship structure
community_vocabulary.notes: Often specific to the church

community_vocabulary.translation: He's on the music ministry
community_vocabulary.notes: Known and visible role

community_vocabulary.translation: Short-term overseas evangelism trips
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals zeal and class — mission trips cost money
community_vocabulary.notes: Worldview about non-Christian places needing rescue

community_vocabulary.translation: He's claiming a specific divine appointment for his life direction
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Signals he believes God has assigned him a specific mission
community_vocabulary.notes: Used to dignify decisions

community_vocabulary.translation: The story of how he came to faith — performed publicly
community_vocabulary.notes: Tells you the shape of his conversion narrative

community_vocabulary.translation: The Holy Spirit has made him feel guilty about something
community_vocabulary.notes: Common explanation for behavior change

community_vocabulary.translation: Following what he believes God wants
community_vocabulary.notes: Often used to dignify his decisions

community_vocabulary.translation: Doing what he believes God forbids
community_vocabulary.notes: Pre-loaded judgment

community_vocabulary.translation: Child of a pastor — specific identity category
community_vocabulary.notes: Carries specific pressures

community_vocabulary.translation: Grew up with parents who were missionaries
community_vocabulary.notes: Often signals childhood overseas

community_vocabulary.translation: Everything outside Christian community — non-Christian culture as a whole
community_vocabulary.notes: How he uses it tells you how isolated his worldview is

community_vocabulary.translation: Influenced by non-Christian culture — accusation
community_vocabulary.notes: Often applied to women's choices in dress or media

community_vocabulary.translation: Christian who isn't serious enough — Revelation 3:16 reference
community_vocabulary.notes: Pre-loaded judgment

community_vocabulary.translation: The wife's role under biblical headship
community_vocabulary.notes: Tells you what he expects in marriage

community_vocabulary.translation: The husband's authority over the wife — Reformed theological term
community_vocabulary.notes: Used when explaining how marriage works

community_vocabulary.translation: Husband as spiritual leader of the family
community_vocabulary.notes: Marriage as theological hierarchy

community_vocabulary.translation: Male authority as spiritual protection for the wife
community_vocabulary.notes: Heavy in some Reformed and charismatic spaces

community_vocabulary.translation: Theological framework of male leadership and female submission as complementary
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Self-applied label means he's traditional on gender
community_vocabulary.notes: Distinct from egalitarian

community_vocabulary.translation: Theological framework of male-female equality in marriage and ministry
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Often pejorative in conservative evangelical use
community_vocabulary.notes: Signals which side of the gender debate he's on

community_vocabulary.translation: Reading the American founders as theologically Christian
community_vocabulary.notes: Common talking point

community_vocabulary.translation: Society is in spiritual and moral decline
community_vocabulary.notes: Used to justify defensive posture

community_vocabulary.translation: Western civilization is falling because it's leaving Christianity
community_vocabulary.notes: Heavy signal

community_vocabulary.translation: Accusation specifically against women — used about women who exercise authority sexually independent or speak prophetically
community_vocabulary.notes: Frequently used against Black women specifically

community_vocabulary.translation: Accusation against weak husbands who let their wives lead
community_vocabulary.notes: Pre-loaded judgment
